title: PicardiRebel unveils new state-of-the-art store in Knysna
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"ADVERTORIAL  - Picardi-Rebel, South Africa's oldest liquor retail brand, has proudly reopened its Knysna store in a sleek new space next to Food Lover's Market on Waterfront Drive.","html":"ADVERTORIAL - Picardi-Rebel, South Africa's oldest liquor retail brand, has proudly reopened its Knysna store in a sleek new space next to Food Lover's Market on Waterfront Drive."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"After over 30 years in the area, this R3m upgrade offers a modern layout and a unique refrigerated display showcasing chilled products behind floor-to-ceiling glass."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The expanded range features over 500 wines and 50+ single malts, including rare labels. Customers can enjoy expert service, monthly promotions and upcoming wine tastings and whisky evenings.","html":"The expanded range features over 500 wines and 50+ single malts, including rare labels. Customers can enjoy expert service, monthly promotions and upcoming wine tastings and whisky evenings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visit PicardiRebel for exceptional selection, service and value - now better than ever.","html":"Visit PicardiRebel for exceptional selection, service and value - now better than ever."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: PicardiRebel unveils new state-of-the-art store in Knysna
